name: Install Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable
code:
# ============================================================
#  Install Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable (cross-platform)
#  Windows  -> native VC++ redistributable installers (below).
#  Linux/Wine -> install the equivalent runtimes into the service's
#               Wine prefix via winetricks (vcrun2010 + vcrun2022).
#  NOTE: official TCAdmin Wine configs are standalone and carry their
#  own deps; this shared script is for users running their own Windows
#  configs on either platform.
# ============================================================

$onLinux = [System.Runtime.InteropServices.RuntimeInformation]::IsOSPlatform([System.Runtime.InteropServices.OSPlatform]::Linux)

if ($onLinux) {
    Write-Host "Linux/Wine host detected - installing VC++ runtimes into the Wine prefix via winetricks..."

    $root = $null
    try { $root = $Globals.ThisService.RootDirectory } catch { }
    if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($root)) { try { $root = $Globals.RootDirectory } catch { } }
    if ([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($root)) {
        Write-Host "Could not resolve the service root directory; skipping VC++ install."
        return
    }

    $env:TCA_SVC_ROOT = $root
    $bash = @'
set -e
ROOT="$TCA_SVC_ROOT"
if [ -z "$ROOT" ] || [ ! -d "$ROOT" ]; then echo "[vcredist] service root '$ROOT' not found; skipping."; exit 0; fi
PREFIX="$ROOT/.wine"
MARKER="$PREFIX/.tcadmin-vcredist"
if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then echo "[vcredist] VC++ runtimes already installed in the wine prefix."; exit 0; fi
OWNER=$(stat -c '%U' "$ROOT")
echo "[vcredist] service user: $OWNER"
RT="$ROOT/.tca/xdg-runtime"; mkdir -p "$RT"; chmod 700 "$RT"; chown "$OWNER" "$RT"
runuser -u "$OWNER" -- env WINEPREFIX="$PREFIX" HOME="$ROOT" XDG_RUNTIME_DIR="$RT" WINEARCH=win64 WINEDEBUG=-all WINEDLLOVERRIDES='mscoree=;mshtml=' xvfb-run -a winetricks -q vcrun2010 vcrun2022
mkdir -p "$PREFIX"; touch "$MARKER"; chown "$OWNER" "$MARKER" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "[vcredist] winetricks finished"
'@

    $out = & /bin/bash -c $bash 2>&1
    $code = $LASTEXITCODE
    foreach ($line in $out) { Write-Host $line }
    Write-Host "[vcredist] bash exit code: $code"
    return
}

# ===================== Windows path (original) =====================

# ============================================================

#  📦 VC++ 2010 + 2015-2022 Redistributable - Silent Installer

# ============================================================



Write-Host ""

Write-Host "====================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host "  📦 VC++ 2010 + 2015-2022 Redistributable Setup   " -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host "====================================================" -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host ""



# ----- Detection: VC++ 2015-2022 (v14) -----

$vc14X64 = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\VisualStudio\14.0\VC\Runtimes\X64" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$vc14X86 = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\VisualStudio\14.0\VC\Runtimes\X86" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue



# ----- Detection: VC++ 2010 (v10) -----

# VC++ 2010 registers under VisualStudio\10.0\VC\VCRedist

$vc10X64 = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\VisualStudio\10.0\VC\VCRedist\x64" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

$vc10X86 = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\VisualStudio\10.0\VC\VCRedist\x86" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# Fallback for 32-bit Windows (no WOW6432Node)

if (-not $vc10X86) {

    $vc10X86 = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\VisualStudio\10.0\VC\VCRedist\x86" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

}



# Short-circuit if everything is already installed

if ($vc14X64 -and $vc14X86 -and $vc10X64 -and $vc10X86) {

    Write-Host "✅ All VC++ Redistributables are already installed!" -ForegroundColor Green

    Write-Host "   VC++ 2015-2022 x64: $($vc14X64.Version)" -ForegroundColor Gray

    Write-Host "   VC++ 2015-2022 x86: $($vc14X86.Version)" -ForegroundColor Gray

    Write-Host "   VC++ 2010 x64:      installed" -ForegroundColor Gray

    Write-Host "   VC++ 2010 x86:      installed" -ForegroundColor Gray

    Write-Host ""

    Write-Host "⏭️  Skipping installation." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Write-Host ""

    return

}



# ----- Download URLs -----

$url14X64 = "https://aka.ms/vc14/vc_redist.x64.exe"

$url14X86 = "https://aka.ms/vc14/vc_redist.x86.exe"

# Microsoft's permanent download links for VC++ 2010 SP1

$url10X64 = "https://download.microsoft.com/download/1/6/5/165255E7-1014-4D0A-B094-B6A430A6BFFC/vcredist_x64.exe"

$url10X86 = "https://download.microsoft.com/download/5/B/C/5BC5DBB3-652D-4DCE-B14A-475AB85EEF6E/vcredist_x86.exe"



# ----- Local paths -----

$dest14X64 = "$env:TEMP\vc_redist.2022.x64.exe"

$dest14X86 = "$env:TEMP\vc_redist.2022.x86.exe"

$dest10X64 = "$env:TEMP\vc_redist.2010.x64.exe"

$dest10X86 = "$env:TEMP\vc_redist.2010.x86.exe"



# ----- What needs installing -----

$install14X64 = -not $vc14X64

$install14X86 = -not $vc14X86

$install10X64 = -not $vc10X64

$install10X86 = -not $vc10X86



# Report current state

if ($vc14X64) { Write-Host "✅ VC++ 2015-2022 x64 already installed ($($vc14X64.Version))" -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($vc14X86) { Write-Host "✅ VC++ 2015-2022 x86 already installed ($($vc14X86.Version))" -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($vc10X64) { Write-Host "✅ VC++ 2010 x64 already installed" -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($vc10X86) { Write-Host "✅ VC++ 2010 x86 already installed" -ForegroundColor Green }

Write-Host ""



# ============================================================

#  Install VC++ 2015-2022 (uses /install /quiet /norestart)

# ============================================================

if ($install14X64) {

    Write-Host "⬇️  Downloading VC++ 2015-2022 x64..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url14X64 -OutFile $dest14X64

    Write-Host "   ✅ Download complete" -ForegroundColor Green



    Write-Host "⚙️  Installing VC++ 2015-2022 x64..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Start-Process -FilePath $dest14X64 -ArgumentList "/install", "/quiet", "/norestart" -Wait

    Write-Host "   ✅ Installed" -ForegroundColor Green

    Write-Host ""

}



if ($install14X86) {

    Write-Host "⬇️  Downloading VC++ 2015-2022 x86..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url14X86 -OutFile $dest14X86

    Write-Host "   ✅ Download complete" -ForegroundColor Green



    Write-Host "⚙️  Installing VC++ 2015-2022 x86..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Start-Process -FilePath $dest14X86 -ArgumentList "/install", "/quiet", "/norestart" -Wait

    Write-Host "   ✅ Installed" -ForegroundColor Green

    Write-Host ""

}



# ============================================================

#  Install VC++ 2010 (uses /q /norestart — different syntax!)

# ============================================================

if ($install10X64) {

    Write-Host "⬇️  Downloading VC++ 2010 x64..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url10X64 -OutFile $dest10X64

    Write-Host "   ✅ Download complete" -ForegroundColor Green



    Write-Host "⚙️  Installing VC++ 2010 x64..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Start-Process -FilePath $dest10X64 -ArgumentList "/q", "/norestart" -Wait

    Write-Host "   ✅ Installed" -ForegroundColor Green

    Write-Host ""

}



if ($install10X86) {

    Write-Host "⬇️  Downloading VC++ 2010 x86..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url10X86 -OutFile $dest10X86

    Write-Host "   ✅ Download complete" -ForegroundColor Green



    Write-Host "⚙️  Installing VC++ 2010 x86..." -ForegroundColor Yellow

    Start-Process -FilePath $dest10X86 -ArgumentList "/q", "/norestart" -Wait

    Write-Host "   ✅ Installed" -ForegroundColor Green

    Write-Host ""

}



# ----- Cleanup -----

Write-Host "🧹 Cleaning up temp files..." -ForegroundColor Gray

foreach ($f in @($dest14X64, $dest14X86, $dest10X64, $dest10X86)) {

    if (Test-Path $f) { Remove-Item $f -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

}



Write-Host ""

Write-Host "====================================================" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host "  🎉 VC++ Redistributables installed successfully! " -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host "====================================================" -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host ""
